title: Spatial transcriptomics deconvolution at single-cell resolution using Redeconve.
author: Zhou Z Zhong Y Zhang Z Ren X
content: S-EPMC10692090 PMC10692090 Spatial transcriptomics deconvolution at single-cell resolution using Redeconve. Computational deconvolution with single-cell RNA sequencing data as reference is pivotal to interpreting spatial transcriptomics data, but the current methods are limited to cell-type
